reasoning: The heal VFX sprite uses saturated bright green (heart fill) paired with warm golden-amber particle pixels and small teal accent dots — a classic warm-harmonious triad that reads immediately as health/vitality. All three hues map cleanly to the Echoes-tuned palette (bright green, parchment gold, teal). Shadows inside the heart use deeper green pixels, not pure black or grey, satisfying the colored-darks requirement. Mood is unambiguously BRIGHT and WARM. No muddy desaturation, no neon spikes, no cold corporate blues, no near-black goth tones. The green-gold complementary pairing is both harmonious and high-legibility for a heal effect. Slight room to push more sunset orange or candy pink into the particle mix for fuller Echoes palette coverage, but this is a minor refinement, not a defect.
